title: Interviewing is debugging a match
hook: An interview is not only a performance. It is also your chance to find the hidden production behavior of the team.

beats.heading: The offer is not the whole answer

blocks.html: A role can have good compensation and still be wrong for your energy, growth, manager, schedule, or values. You need questions that reveal the day-to-day system.

blocks.title: interview · questions
blocks.caption: The useful signal is usually already there.

lines.t: How are incidents handled after hours?
What changed in the last performance cycle?
What would make this hire successful in 90 days?

blocks.html: Specific stories beat brand claims. Ask about a recent conflict, launch, missed deadline, promotion, or incident. Real examples reveal operating habits.

blocks.code:
Signal: manager gave concrete examples
Concern: roadmap changed weekly, no prioritization method
Follow-up: ask future teammates about review load
blocks.caption: Notes keep excitement from overwriting evidence.

blocks.html: You are being assessed, but so is the company. A healthy interview process leaves you with more clarity, not just more anxiety.

items.label: days to ask about success criteria

blocks.html: The job is the system around the work. Interview that system before you join it.
